query: intentional camera movement ICM abstract blurred photography painterly
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: ICM intentional camera movement, painterly abstract blur

response.objective_caption: A vertically oriented image dominated by warm orange and red tones flowing across the frame in soft, elongated streaks. Lighter peach and salmon highlights arc diagonally from the upper left toward the center. The lower portion transitions into muted green and yellow-green areas at the bottom right corner, with a pale gray-blue region at the bottom left. No distinct objects, figures, or identifiable subjects are discernible; the composition consists entirely of gradient color fields with curving linear elements.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A vertically oriented abstract image dominated by warm orange and red tones flowing across the frame in soft, elongated streaks created through motion blur. Lighter peach and salmon highlights arc diagonally from the upper left toward the center. The lower portion transitions into muted green and yellow-green areas at the bottom right corner, with a pale gray-blue region at the bottom left. The extreme blur eliminates all recognizable subject matter, rendering the photograph purely as color, gesture, and fluid form with no discernible objects or figures.
